verses.1: Who is this who comes from Edom,
verses.3: “I have trodden the wine press alone.
verses.4: For the day of vengeance was in my heart,
verses.5: I looked, and there was no one to help;
verses.6: I trod down the peoples in my anger
verses.7: I will tell of the loving kindnesses of the LORD
verses.8: For he said, “Surely, they are my people,
verses.9: In all their affliction he was afflicted,
verses.11: Then he remembered the days of old,
verses.12: Who caused his glorious arm to be at Moses’ right hand?
verses.13: Who led them through the depths,
verses.14: As the livestock that go down into the valley,
verses.17: O LORD, why do you make us wander from your ways,
verses.18: Your holy people possessed it but a little while.
verses.19: We have become like those over whom you never ruled,
